scope.goal: Produce the P1 invariant -> interface -> event -> Foundry test matrix for GlyphReceiptLedger and GlyphAttestationRegistry, with explicit P1 exclusions and unresolved blockers called out.

filesChanged.change: Created the P1 interface/event/test matrix for GlyphReceiptLedger and GlyphAttestationRegistry, including boundaries, proposed data model, EIP-712/EIP-1271 path, ID derivations, transition table, reconciliation rules, purpose/identity behavior, exclusions, and blockers.
Created the required handoff record for review.

commands.purpose: Capture current Git HEAD and dirty state.

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
try:
    import jsonschema
    print('jsonschema-available', jsonschema.__version__)
except Exception as e:
    print('jsonschema-unavailable', type(e).__name__, e)
PY
commands.purpose: Check whether jsonschema is available for handoff validation.

commands.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from jsonschema import validate
schema = json.loads(Path('/root/monadglyph/state/handoff.schema.json').read_text())
data = json.loads(Path('/root/monadglyph/state/handoffs/p1-mini-matrix.json').read_text())
validate(instance=data, schema=schema)
print('schema-validation: ok')
PY
commands.purpose: Validate the handoff JSON against state/handoff.schema.json.

assertions.claim: The requested matrix document was written to the allowed architecture path.
The handoff record was written to the allowed state path.
jsonschema is available in this runtime, so schema validation can be performed.
Current repository state is dirty and HEAD was captured for the handoff.

risks.description: Several source docs leave later-phase routing/messenger/vault surfaces intentionally out of P1; the matrix therefore defers those invariant IDs rather than fabricating P1 behavior.
Claim expiry handling is split between append-only stored status and derived EXPIRED view state; this document chooses the derived-view interpretation and flags it for review.
Exact EIP-712 contract names/version strings are proposed, not locked.
